body.text: Day 2026-07-08 — Fable judgment block + Opus build-out. 9 tickets closed proven (rules-store-materialize, builder-memory-repo-residency, ungate-status-flip, claude-md-stale-anchors, consequence-ticket-aging-alarm, produced-by-emission-sweep, validity-sweep-day-close) + examiner-station design half + audit-run-records reframed (telemetry on retired palace -> filed T-audit-telemetry-flatfile-repoint). New tooling: rules_citation_check, claude_md_anchor_check, consequence_aging, validity_sweep, produced_by at 3 emission chokepoints. Filed T-proof-emitter-test-store-isolation. HIGH-inertia gate confirmed off while Igor iced.
